hyperedges.label: React-Redux-Saga data flow architecture
hyperedges.shared_concept: Unidirectional data flow pattern: React manages views, Redux manages state, redux-saga handles async side effects

hyperedges.label: Network communication + keyboard input pipeline
hyperedges.shared_concept: Trading platform real-time input/output stack: protobuf serialization over WebSocket, plus keyboard-driven order entry

hyperedges.label: Trading UI localization subsystem
hyperedges.shared_concept: Chinese i18n covering the three core trading UI surfaces: technical analysis indicators, drawing tools, and order management

nodes.source_location: line 1: '基于 React 和 Material UI 的单页程序'
